ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "trans_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items sold in the transaction */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item sold */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who handled the transaction */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the transaction */,
  "is_return" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the transaction is a return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trans_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the client */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the client */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the client */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the client wants to receive marketing communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the employee works in */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
column_names: Quantity of items sold in the transaction
ID of the client who made the transaction
ID of the store where the transaction occurred
ID of the employee who handled the transaction
Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash)
Discount amount applied to the transaction
Boolean indicating if the transaction is a return
Date of birth of the client
Boolean indicating if the client wants to receive marketing communications
ID of the category the item belongs to
Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered
ID of the store the employee works in
